title: Code review and implement all suggestions

log.context: Code review and implement all suggestions

All services restarted successfully. Here's a summary of everything found and fixed:

---

**Bugs found and fixed across 3 repos:**

**temporal-workflows** (`dd762e8`)

1. **`nightowl_wf.py` — `asyncio.sleep` in a Temporal workflow** (critical): Temporal workflows are deterministic and replayed from history. `asyncio.sleep` uses wall-clock time and is non-deterministic — it would cause replay failures. Replaced with `workflow.sleep(timedelta(seconds=wait_seconds))` which is deterministic and sur...(truncated)
